result.markdown: --- title: "Week 10: Multiple regression and forecasting" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## Tutorial exercises - Complete Exercises 11, 12, 13, 15 (d,e), 16 (d,e) from [Section 9.11 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/arima-exercises.html). - [Tutorial learning objectives](tute-lo.qmd). ## What you will learn this week * Useful predictors for time series forecasting using regression * Selecting predictors * Ex ante and ex post forecasting ## Pre-seminar activities Read [Chapter 7 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/regression.html) and watch all embedded videos # ```{r} # #| output: asis # show_slides(week) # ``` ## Seminar activities 1. Build a multiple regression model to forecast US consumption expenditure in the `us_change` tsibble. 2. Build a harmonic regression model to forecast weekly US finished motor gasoline products supplied in barrels in the `us_gasoline` tsibble. 3. Exam 2023 - Section A: Q4, Q5 - Section B: Q3 (g-h) ## Seminar code ::: {.callout appearance="minimal"} [week10.R](week10.R){download="week10.R"} ::: ## Assignments * [GA3](../assignments/G3.qmd) is due on Monday 11 May. * [IA4](../assignments/A4.qmd) is due on Monday 18 May. * [GA4](../assignments/G4.qmd) is due on Monday 25 May. ## Weekly quiz * [Week 10 quiz](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=3868) is due on Monday 11 May.
